executable.cmd: ros2 run topic_tools transform /robot_1/odometry_conversion/odometry /robot_1/odometry_conversion/pose_stamped geometry_msgs/PoseStamped 'geometry_msgs.msg.PoseStamped(header=m.header, pose=m.pose.pose)' --import geometry_msgs nav_msgs

python3 -m rayfronts.mapping_server --config-name $(var config_name) dataset=$(var dataset) messaging_service=ros querying.text_query_mode=prompts querying.query_file=null querying.compute_prob=True querying.period=$(var query_period)
